metadata.title: er-conjugation-in-conversation
metadata.description: Practice er verb conjugation in conversation

sentences.original: MAMÁ: Mañana vamos a un picnic en el parque. ¿Qué quieren comer ustedes?
sentences.translation: MOM: Tomorrow we are going to a picnic in the park. What do you all want to eat?

chunks.meaning: Tomorrow we are going to a picnic
What do you all want to eat?

sentences.original: JUAN: Yo quiero pizza con soda.
sentences.translation: JUAN: I want pizza with soda.

sentences.original: MARÍA Y ROSA: Nosotras queremos tacos y hamburguesas.
sentences.translation: MARÍA & ROSA: We want tacos and hamburgers.

sentences.original: MAMÁ: Y tú, Jaime, ¿qué quieres comer?
sentences.translation: MOM: And you, Jaime, what do you want to eat?

chunks.meaning: what do you want to eat?

sentences.original: MARÍA: Mamá, mis amigas Luisa y Marta quieren ir.
sentences.translation: MARÍA: Mom, my friends Luisa and Marta want to go.

sentences.original: MAMÁ: Está bien. Ahora quiero hablar con la persona más importante.
sentences.translation: MOM: It’s okay. Now I want to talk with the most important person.

sentences.original: TODOS: ¿Quién es la persona más importante?
sentences.translation: EVERYONE: Who is the most important person?

sentences.original: MAMÁ: Tu papá. ¡Él tiene el mapa para llegar al parque!
sentences.translation: MOM: Your dad. He has the map to get to the park!
Pedro: Juan, what are you reading?

sentences.original: Juan: Leo una novela para mi clase de inglés.
sentences.translation: Juan: I’m reading a novel for my English class.
Juan: What are you all reading?

sentences.original: Pedro y Liliana: Nosotros leemos una novela también.
sentences.translation: Pedro y Liliana: We are reading a novel too.

sentences.original: Juan: ¿Oh sí? Creo que todos los alumnos de la señora Fernández leen mucho.
sentences.translation: Juan: Oh really? I believe all of Mrs. Fernandez's students read a lot.

chunks.meaning: I believe that all the students

sentences.original: Pedro: La señora Fernández cree que si usted no lee, no aprende.
sentences.translation: Pedro: Mrs. Fernandez believes that if you don't read, you don't learn.

chunks.text: si usted no lee, no aprende.
chunks.meaning: if you don't read, you don't learn.

sentences.original: Liliana: Si no aprende, no pasa el curso.
sentences.translation: Liliana: If one doesn't learn, one doesn't pass the course.

sentences.original: Todos: ¡Ay, ay, ay! Comprendemos. ¡Es importante leer!
sentences.translation: Everyone: Oh boy! We understand. It's important to read!
